title: Chain 1/8: Decide What to Order
scene: 周六晚上，你和室友商量晚饭点外卖。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: Cook tonight or order in?
Delivery. I'm craving Thai.
How spicy can you handle?

turns.cn: 中辣，你点炒河粉我点绿咖喱。
turns.en: Medium. You get pad see ew, I'll get green curry.
Okay. I'll place the order.
Remember no peanuts in the notes.

title: Chain 2/8: Add Delivery Notes
scene: 室友下单时问你送餐细节。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: What should I put in the delivery notes?

turns.cn: 走侧门，在停车场那边，到了打电话。
turns.en: Use the side door by the parking lot. Call when you arrive.
How much tip?
Four dollars. Rainy day is tough.

turns.cn: 下单了，预计三十五分钟。
turns.en: Ordered. ETA thirty-five minutes.
Great. I'll take a quick shower.

title: Chain 3/8: Driver Can't Find You
scene: 外卖员打电话说找不到楼。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.cn: 喂，我是送您外卖的，找不到入口。
turns.en: Hi, I'm delivering your food. I can't find the entrance.

turns.cn: 走侧门，在停车场那边，我下来接你。
turns.en: Use the side door by the parking lot. I'll come down.
Okay. I'm wearing a yellow rain jacket.
I see you. Over here!
Here you go. Enjoy it while it's hot.
Thanks. Drive safe!

title: Chain 4/8: Check the Order
scene: 你拿外卖上楼，和室友核对袋子。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: Food's here. Bag didn't leak, right?
Looks fine. Enough chopsticks?
Two pairs. Where's the drink?
At the bottom. Thai iced tea.
Great. Let's eat.

title: Chain 5/8: Missing Item
scene: 打开盒子发现少了一碗炒饭。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.cn: 我那份炒饭呢？只有咖喱和河粉。
turns.en: Where's my fried rice? Just curry and noodles.
It's missing. I'll contact the restaurant.

turns.cn: 要不先吃我的河粉分你一半？
turns.en: Want half my noodles while we wait?
No need. I'll call them.
Receipt's in the bag.

title: Chain 6/8: Call Support
scene: 你打客服电话反映漏送。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.cn: 客服中心，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Customer support. How can I help?

turns.cn: 订单少了炒饭，能补送吗？
turns.en: My order is missing fried rice. Can you resend it?

turns.cn: 抱歉，我查一下……确实漏了。
turns.en: I'm sorry. Let me check. It was missed.
How long will the resend take?

turns.cn: 二十分钟，给您退炒饭的钱。
turns.en: Twenty minutes. We'll refund the rice too.
Okay. Thank you.

title: Chain 7/8: Resend Arrives
scene: 补送的炒饭到了门口。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: Resend fried rice for Mr. Zhang?
Yes. Thanks for being quick.

turns.cn: 餐厅道歉了，祝您用餐愉快。
turns.en: The restaurant apologizes. Enjoy your meal.
Okay. Bye.

title: Chain 8/8: Rate the Order
scene: 吃完后，App 弹出评价请求。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: How was the food? How many stars?

turns.cn: 咖喱不错，漏送扣一星，四星吧。
turns.en: Curry was good. Minus one for the missing item. Four stars.

turns.cn: 备注里写一下漏送处理了？
turns.en: Note that they fixed the missing item?
Sure. Support was fast.
Order from them again?
Yeah. Just double-check the bag.
